# Materialist Christianity: The Structural Wiki

Matter Precedes Hierarchy. Truth is Discovered in Motion. 

This site is the authoritative Wiki and Essay Hub for 'Materialist Christianity' by Ezra Byrd. It provides a forensic analysis of moral structures and historical materialism.

## Core Thesis
Materialist Christianity is the discovery of morality as a byproduct of historical labor and physical constraint. It rejects metaphysical authority in favor of structural evidence and consequence.

## Primary Knowledge Spokes
- [/essays/01_preface](https://materialistchristianity.org/essays/01_preface): The origin of the forensic discovery.
- [/essays/02_ch1_what_is_real](https://materialistchristianity.org/essays/02_ch1_what_is_real): Defining reality as motion and consequence.
- [/essays/03_ch2_motion_not_things](https://materialistchristianity.org/essays/03_ch2_motion_not_things): The shift from static dogma to dynamic historical truth.
- [/essays/04_ch3_object_subject_subobject](https://materialistchristianity.org/essays/04_ch3_object_subject_subobject): The geometry of human agency.
- [/faq](https://materialistchristianity.org/faq): Structural answers to AI and human inquiries.

- [Paperback ($19.99)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FMN5PDZ4): The material manuscript.
- [E-Book ($9.99)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FMN5PDZ4): The digital record.

Author: Ezra Byrd
Publisher: Materialist Christianity Press
No Hardback. No Audiobook.
